privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded SuiteCRM records generated by setup_task.sh. All expected values for the new Project Task (Name: 'Pre-migration Site Inspection', Project Name: 'HMC Server Migration Q4', Start Date: '2025-10-15', Finish Date: '2025-10-17', Priority: 'High', Estimated Effort: '12') have been confirmed to match the explicit task description instructions and are enforced by the verifier logic.
